character.name: 장료 (Zhang Liao)
character.prompt: Cute chibi-style ancient Chinese warrior Zhang Liao from Three Kingdoms. Wearing distinctive blue and silver heavy armor with a tall silver helmet. Holding a long crescent blade polearm weapon. Loyal and stern expression but adorable chibi proportions. Dark hair. Blue cape flowing behind.
